mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate reduces corporate borrowing costs and compresses discount rates, directly increasing present values of future equity cash flows and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.0 percent, labor market slack signals weakening consumer spending power, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample directional accuracy falls below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and capital investment strength, driving positive quarterly equity returns through broad-based earnings growth.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields a negative or zero Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are not statistically higher than single-proxy baselines (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rising index of industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase reflects rapid capacity utilization and supply chain normalization, generating positive short-term market momentum as investors price in rebounding output.
failure_condition: Signal accuracy drops below 50% during identified recovery regimes, or 5-day forward returns show no significant positive drift (t-test p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 290.0, elevated inflation expectations force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in > 60% of triggered instances, or the signal directional accuracy fails to exceed random chance (50%) over a 2-year walk-forward test.

mechanism_narrative: A divergence where nonfarm payrolls rise while the unemployment rate falls confirms genuine labor market tightening, supporting corporate earnings growth and positive monthly equity returns through wage-driven demand.
failure_condition: Interaction term yields a negative marginal contribution to predictive power, or combined signal accuracy falls below 52% over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real gross domestic product directly correlates with aggregate corporate revenue growth, creating a persistent positive drift in equity markets over a quarterly horizon as macroeconomic expansion translates to earnings.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with GDP growth (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below its 2017 baseline of 100.0, manufacturing contraction signals economic deceleration, triggering negative short-term equity returns as investors price in lower earnings and reduced capacity utilization.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample directional accuracy falls below 55%.
